zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert VI d'AUVERGNE於大約1130年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊時，他的父親Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE36歲，母親Anne de NEVERS22歲。他於1165年5月16日與Mathilde de Bourgogne在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1194年7月6日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆布謝特享年65歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o倫德-吉布隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert VI d'AUVERGNE于大约1130年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊时，他的父亲Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE36岁，母亲Anne de NEVERS22岁。他于1165年5月16日与Mathilde de Bourgogne在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1194年7月6日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆布謝特享年65岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o倫德-吉布隆。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert VI d'AUVERGNE was born about 1130, in Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, was 36 and his mother, Anne de NEVERS, was 22. He married Mathilde de Bourgogne on 16 May 1165, in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 July 1194, in Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert VI d'AUVERGNE est né environ 1130, à Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne de NEVERS, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Bourgogne le 16 mai 1165, à Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1194, à Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert VI d'AUVERGNE um 1130 in Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE 36 und seine Mutter Anne de NEVERS 22. Er hat am 16. Mai 1165 in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Mathilde de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Juli 1194 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VI d'AUVERGNE è nato il circa 1130 nel Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anne de NEVERS, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Bourgogne il 16 maggio 1165, nel Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 luglio 1194, nel Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert VI d'AUVERGNEが約1130年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイで生まれた時，父Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNEは36歳，母Anne de NEVERSは22歳であった。1165年5月16日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスでMathilde de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年7月6日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメボウチェトで65歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメイロンデ-エト-ブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert VI d'AUVERGNE(이)가 대략 1130년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de NEVERS(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1165년 5월 16일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스에서 Mathilde de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 7월 6일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 부쳇에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 이론데-트-버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VI d'AUVERGNE nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anne de NEVERS, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Bourgogne em 16 de maio de 1165, em Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1194, em Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert VI d'AUVERGNE родился около 1130 г. в местности савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de NEVERS, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Bourgogne 16 мая 1165 г. в местности аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 июля 1194 г. в местности боучет, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности иронде-ет-бурон, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert VI d'AUVERGNE nació aproximadamente 1130, en Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anne de NEVERS, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mathilde de Bourgogne el 16 de mayo de 1165, en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de julio de 1194, en Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
